calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award For Judgment In Conformance Therewith
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Dawn D. Johnson of the law offices of Wood Robbins LLP (415.247.790) appears by telephone as counsel for petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

PETITIONER WOOD ROBBINS, LLP's Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award For Judgment In Conformance Therewith is GRANTED and arbitration award is confirmed. Wood Robbins is entitled to entry of judgment in its favor and against respondents SMRWC, Inc. and BO-MIC, Inc. for the amounts awarded by the arbitrator. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
